title: Long Short-Term Memory
description: Introduced gated recurrent units (LSTMs) that preserve information across long sequences.
conceptDescription: Introduced gated recurrent units (LSTMs) that preserve information across long sequences.
valueAdd: Enabled models to remember earlier context and learn long-range dependencies in language.

title: A Neural Probabilistic Language Model
description: Learned dense vector embeddings for words instead of sparse symbolic representations.
conceptDescription: Learned dense vector embeddings for words instead of sparse symbolic representations.
valueAdd: Allowed semantic similarity and analogical reasoning to emerge from learned embeddings.

title: Word2Vec
description: Learned word meanings from unlabeled text by predicting nearby words (word2vec).
conceptDescription: Learned word meanings from unlabeled text by predicting nearby words (word2vec).
valueAdd: Made representation learning scalable to web-scale corpora without manual labels.

title: Sequence to Sequence Learning
description: Used encoder–decoder architectures to transform one sequence into another.
conceptDescription: Used encoder–decoder architectures to transform one sequence into another.
valueAdd: Unified translation, summarization, and dialogue under a common neural framework.

title: Neural Attention Mechanisms
description: Allowed models to focus dynamically on relevant parts of the input during generation.
conceptDescription: Allowed models to focus dynamically on relevant parts of the input during generation.
valueAdd: Improved handling of long sequences and became foundational for modern LLM architectures.

title: Pointer Networks
description: Enabled models to explicitly reference or copy elements from the input.
conceptDescription: Enabled models to explicitly reference or copy elements from the input.
valueAdd: Improved handling of structured data, rare tokens, code, and factual references.

title: Transformer Architecture
description: Replaced recurrence with self-attention to model all token relationships in parallel.
conceptDescription: Replaced recurrence with self-attention to model all token relationships in parallel.
valueAdd: Created the Transformer architecture, dramatically improving scalability and performance.

title: Positional Encoding
description: Injected sequence order information into attention-only models.
conceptDescription: Injected sequence order information into attention-only models.
valueAdd: Allowed Transformers to model ordered language without recurrent structures.

title: Generative Pre-Training (GPT)
description: Trained large language models on massive unlabeled corpora before downstream adaptation.
conceptDescription: Trained large language models on massive unlabeled corpora before downstream adaptation.
valueAdd: Enabled general-purpose language understanding and generation capabilities.

title: BERT
description: Learned token representations using both left and right context simultaneously.
conceptDescription: Learned token representations using both left and right context simultaneously.
valueAdd: Improved nuanced language understanding, ambiguity resolution, and contextual comprehension.

title: GPT-2
description: Demonstrated that scaling autoregressive language models improves broad generative abilities.
conceptDescription: Demonstrated that scaling autoregressive language models improves broad generative abilities.
valueAdd: Produced coherent long-form text and emergent task capabilities.

title: Neural Scaling Laws
description: Showed predictable performance improvements from scaling parameters, data, and compute.
conceptDescription: Showed predictable performance improvements from scaling parameters, data, and compute.
valueAdd: Provided a roadmap for training larger and more capable foundation models.

title: GPT-3 / In-Context Learning
description: Demonstrated that models can perform tasks from examples embedded in prompts.
conceptDescription: Demonstrated that models can perform tasks from examples embedded in prompts.
valueAdd: Enabled flexible prompting without retraining or task-specific fine-tuning.

title: Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
description: Encouraged models to generate intermediate reasoning steps before answers.
conceptDescription: Encouraged models to generate intermediate reasoning steps before answers.
valueAdd: Improved reasoning, mathematics, planning, and multi-step problem solving.

title: WebGPT
description: Enabled language models to interact with web browsers and external information sources.
conceptDescription: Enabled language models to interact with web browsers and external information sources.
valueAdd: Introduced the idea of LLMs operating external tools instead of relying only on parametric memory.

title: Instruction Tuning
description: Fine-tuned models on natural-language instructions and demonstrations.
conceptDescription: Fine-tuned models on natural-language instructions and demonstrations.
valueAdd: Made models substantially more useful, controllable, and aligned with user intent.

title: RLHF (Human Preference Alignment)
description: Optimized model outputs using human preference rankings (RLHF).
conceptDescription: Optimized model outputs using human preference rankings (RLHF).
valueAdd: Improved helpfulness, conversational quality, and safety.

title: ReAct
description: Combined reasoning traces with external actions like search or API calls.
conceptDescription: Combined reasoning traces with external actions like search or API calls.
valueAdd: Created the conceptual basis for autonomous AI agents and coding assistants.

title: Reflexion
description: Allowed agents to critique prior failures and iteratively improve behavior.
conceptDescription: Allowed agents to critique prior failures and iteratively improve behavior.
valueAdd: Improved robustness and multi-step task completion without retraining the model.

title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)
description: Combined language models with external retrieval systems.
conceptDescription: Combined language models with external retrieval systems.
valueAdd: Reduced hallucinations and enabled access to fresh or private information sources.

title: Toolformer
description: Trained models to reliably invoke APIs and software tools.
conceptDescription: Trained models to reliably invoke APIs and software tools.
valueAdd: Enabled integration with IDEs, browsers, databases, and external computation systems.

title: Generative Agents
description: Introduced long-term memory streams with retrieval and reflection mechanisms for agents.
conceptDescription: Introduced long-term memory streams with retrieval and reflection mechanisms for agents.
valueAdd: Enabled agents to maintain identity, context, and continuity across extended interactions.

title: Voyager
description: Agents stored and reused learned behaviors as executable skills.
conceptDescription: Agents stored and reused learned behaviors as executable skills.
valueAdd: Enabled cumulative learning and increasingly capable autonomous behavior over time.

title: CAMEL
description: Multiple LLM agents cooperated through role-based communication.
conceptDescription: Multiple LLM agents cooperated through role-based communication.
valueAdd: Enabled decomposition of complex tasks into coordinated subtasks.

title: AutoGPT
description: Agents recursively planned and executed subtasks toward high-level goals.
conceptDescription: Agents recursively planned and executed subtasks toward high-level goals.
valueAdd: Demonstrated autonomous workflows with planning loops and iterative execution.

title: Mixture-of-Experts (Switch Transformers)
description: Activated only subsets of model parameters for each token.
conceptDescription: Activated only subsets of model parameters for each token.
valueAdd: Increased effective model capacity while reducing compute costs.

title: LongRoPE
description: Extended Transformer context windows to millions of tokens.
conceptDescription: Extended Transformer context windows to millions of tokens.
valueAdd: Enabled repository-scale coding, document analysis, and persistent conversational memory.

title: SWE-agent
description: Combined planning, memory, retrieval, and tools into iterative autonomous workflows.
conceptDescription: Combined planning, memory, retrieval, and tools into iterative autonomous workflows.
valueAdd: Enabled coding agents capable of debugging, editing, testing, and executing multi-step tasks autonomously.

title: OpenDevin
description: Integrated terminals, editors, browsers, and execution environments into agent loops.
conceptDescription: Integrated terminals, editors, browsers, and execution environments into agent loops.
valueAdd: Enabled agents to interact with real developer tooling and complete end-to-end coding workflows.
